Name: UCanvasRenderTarget2D
Description:
CanvasRenderTarget2D is 2D render target which exposes a Canvas interface to allow you to draw elements onto 
  it directly.  Use CreateCanvasRenderTarget2D() to create a render target texture by unique name, then
  bind a function to the OnCanvasRenderTargetUpdate delegate which will be called when the render target is
  updated.  If you need to repaint your canvas every single frame, simply call UpdateResource() on it from a Tick
  function.  Also, remember to hold onto your new canvas render target with a reference so that it doesn't get
  garbage collected.

Variables.Name: World
Variables.Description: The world this render target will be used with

Functions.Name: UpdateResource
Functions.Description:
Updates the the canvas render target texture's resource. This is where the render target will create or 
	  find a canvas object to use.  It also calls UpdateResourceImmediate() to clear the render target texture 
	  from the deferred rendering list, to stop the texture from being cleared the next frame. From there it
	  will ask the rendering thread to set up the RHI viewport. The canvas is then set up for rendering and 
	  then the user's update delegate is called.  The canvas is then flushed and the RHI resolves the 
	  texture to make it available for rendering.

Functions.Name: CreateCanvasRenderTarget2D
Functions.Description: Creates a new canvas render target and initializes it to the specified dimensions

Params.Name: WorldContextObject
Params.Description: The world where this render target will be rendered for

Params.Name: CanvasRenderTarget2DClass
Params.Description: Class of the render target. Unless you want to use a special sub-class, you can simply pass UCanvasRenderTarget2D::StaticClass() here.

Functions.Name: ReceiveUpdate
Functions.Description: Allows a Blueprint to implement how this Canvas Render Target 2D should be updated.

Params.Name: Canvas
Params.Description: Canvas object that can be used to paint to the render target

Functions.Name: GetSize
Functions.Description: Gets a specific render target's size from the global map of canvas render targets.

Params.Name: Width
Params.Description: Output variable for the render target's width

Params.Name: Height
Params.Description: Output variable for the render target's height

Delegate.Name: OnCanvasRenderTargetUpdate
Delegate.Description: Called when this Canvas Render Target is asked to update its texture resource.
